arts.ttl: Burnley v Portsmouth: Team news, predicted teams and TV details as Clarets aim to build on Leeds United win
arts.sum: Burnley return to Turf Moor this afternoon looking to build on last week’s impressive win against Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Watch: The moment three proud but provocative Portsmouth supporters are asked to leave Everton's Goodison Park - after getting under the skin of Southampton supporters
arts.sum: Pompey supporters head to Burnley today for their latest instalment of Championship football.

arts.ttl: Why Burnley boss Scott Parker isn't paying too much attention to Portsmouth's winless start
arts.sum: Scott Parker knows Burnley’s next opponents Portsmouth shouldn’t be underestimated despite their winless start to the season.

arts.ttl: ‘Fantastic business. Strange timing. Signings of the summer’ – how the Fratton faithful reacted to Portsmouth’s decision to reward key duo
arts.sum: Pompey fans on social media have been reacting to news that both John Mousinho and Rich Hughes have agreed extensions to their existing long-term Fratton Park contracts.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker discusses Hannibal's lively start to Burnley career following taunting of Leeds United fans
arts.sum: Scott Parker is happy for Hannibal to remain right “on the line” following his lively start to his Burnley career.

arts.ttl: The harsh reality of fight Portsmouth midfielder faces after being left in cold
arts.sum: John Mousinho has acknowledged Owen Moxon faces a tough battle to force his way back into the Pompey starting XI.

arts.ttl: Burnley v Portsmouth injury news as 7 out and 4 doubts
arts.sum: Pompey are on their travels this weekend as they face Burnley at Turf Moor in the EFL Championship.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth trio learn of shock managerial resignation following poor start to campaign
arts.sum: A trio of Pompey players will have a new manager to impress if they are to make the most of their international careers.

arts.ttl: Important Portsmouth duo handed Fratton Park contract extensions as reward for delivering Championship football
arts.sum: Head coach John Mousinho and sporting director Rich Hughes have agreed extensions to their existing long-term Fratton Park contracts.

arts.ttl: ‘Unluckiest player in Championship’: The Portsmouth man facing challenge no one wants ahead of Burnley and Sheffield United
arts.sum: Connor Ogilvie has been branded the most unfortunate player in the Championship as he takes on a who’s who of second-tier wingers.
